_doc: Single source of truth for .claude/agents/*.md model: fields. Edit this file from an OPERATOR terminal (protect-ralph-files.sh blocks .claude/ writes from inside any Claude Code session), then run `bash scripts/apply-agent-models.sh` to propagate. Drift is enforced by tests/unit/test_agent_models_lockstep.bats — CI fails if the manifest and the agent files diverge. See docs/OPERATOR-EDITS.md for the full workflow.
